# llms-full.txt - extended plain-text discovery metadata for LLMs and AI crawlers
name: AdamMarczak.PL
author: Adam Marczak
url: https://adammarczak.pl
description: Personal about-me website of Adam Marczak with career background, achievements, and technical channel references.
primary_topics: about-me,professional-profile,cloud-architecture,azure,community,education
content_overview: |
  AdamMarczak.PL presents Adam Marczak's professional profile, background, and selected achievements.
  It includes links to social profiles, key roles, and external technical channels such as Azure 4 Everyone.
  This website is focused on personal identity and discovery rather than article catalogs.

    url: https://www.youtube.com/azure4everyone
    description: Video tutorials for Azure integration, Logic Apps, serverless architecture, and AI automation.
